MODULE: cosmos.secrets.vault_manager
FILE: cosmos/secrets/vault_manager.py (725 lines)
CATEGORY: secrets

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Secrets and Credentials Vault Manager

"I've hidden my secrets so well, even I can't find them!"

Unified secrets management with rotation, versioning, and audit logging.

CLASSES:
- SecretType(Enum): Types of secrets.
- SecretStatus(Enum): Secret status.
- SecretVersion: A version of a secret.
- Secret: A secret with versioning.
  Methods: def to_dict(self, include_value: bool=False) -> Dict[str, Any]
- SecretAccessLog: Audit log entry for secret access.
- SecretsProvider(ABC): Abstract base class for secrets providers.
  Methods: async def get_secret(self, path: str, version: int=None) -> Optional[Secret]
  Methods: async def set_secret(self, secret: Secret) -> bool
  Methods: async def delete_secret(self, path: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def list_secrets(self, path_prefix: str='') -> List[str]
  Methods: async def rotate_secret(self, path: str) -> bool
- LocalVaultProvider(SecretsProvider): Local file-based secrets vault with encryption.
For development and testing purp
  Methods: async def get_secret(self, path: str, version: int=None) -> Optional[Secret]
  Methods: async def set_secret(self, secret: Secret) -> bool
  Methods: async def delete_secret(self, path: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def list_secrets(self, path_prefix: str='') -> List[str]
  Methods: async def rotate_secret(self, path: str) -> bool
- VaultManager: Unified secrets management across multiple providers.

Features:
- Multi-provide
  Methods: def register_provider(self, name: str, provider: SecretsProvider)
  Methods: def get_provider(self, name: str=None) -> Optional[SecretsProvider]
  Methods: async def get_secret(self, path: str, provider: str=None, version: int=None, actor: str='system', se
  Methods: async def create_secret(self, path: str, value: str, secret_type: SecretType=SecretType.GENERIC, nam
  Methods: async def update_secret(self, path: str, value: str, provider: str=None, actor: str='system') -> boo
  Methods: async def delete_secret(self, path: str, provider: str=None, actor: str='system') -> bool
  Methods: async def list_secrets(self, path_prefix: str='', provider: str=None) -> List[str]
  Methods: def register_rotation_callback(self, secret_type: SecretType, callback: Callable)
